summary: AI Character Generation ('Unseen Servant' in Character Builder) feature testing complete. All 21 tests passed - 12 backend API tests and 9 frontend E2E tests. The feature correctly generates complete D&D characters from natural language descriptions.

quarantined_tests.reason: Pre-existing issue - tests expect data-testids that don't exist on current UI (unseen-servant-god-prompt, summon-god-btn). Not related to new AI Character Generation feature.

action_items: Pre-existing: unseen-servant.spec.ts needs update - the Gods/NPCs/Locations tabs don't show Unseen Servant panels as expected. The UI shows empty states with 'CREATE YOUR FIRST GOD' buttons instead of inline Unseen Servant prompts.
seed_data_creation: Test user aitest@test.com with password test123456 (pre-existing). Test campaign created for campaign-related tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Character Generation feature fully tested. Backend endpoint POST /api/ai/generate-character working with GPT-5.2. Frontend Character Builder (/characters/new) has Unseen Servant panel with data-testids: ai-panel-toggle, ai-character-prompt, ai-suggestion-0 to ai-suggestion-4, ai-generate-btn. Updated TEST_USER in helpers.ts to use aitest@test.com credentials. Note: existing unseen-servant.spec.ts tests for campaign Gods/NPCs/Locations are failing due to pre-existing UI differences.

features_tested.ai_generation_success: PASS - Generates complete character from description
features_tested.ai_has_required_fields: PASS - Character has name, race, class, background, alignment, abilities, traits, backstory
features_tested.ai_valid_race: PASS - Generated race is from valid D&D 5e races
features_tested.ai_valid_class: PASS - Generated class is from valid D&D 5e classes
features_tested.ai_valid_background: PASS - Generated background is from valid D&D 5e backgrounds
features_tested.ai_valid_alignment: PASS - Generated alignment is from valid D&D alignments
features_tested.ai_message_format: PASS - Success message contains character name and 'Unseen Servant'
features_tested.ui_panel_visible: PASS - Unseen Servant panel shows on Character Builder
features_tested.ui_prompt_textarea: PASS - Description textarea with proper placeholder
features_tested.ui_generate_disabled_empty: PASS - Generate button disabled when empty
features_tested.ui_short_description_error: PASS - Shows error toast for short description
features_tested.ui_generation_flow: PASS - AI generates character and populates form fields
features_tested.ui_panel_toggle: PASS - Panel can be collapsed and expanded
features_tested.ui_default_values: PASS - Form fields have default values (Human, Fighter)
